text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Heeeey, Trainer! Listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm making my rounds throughout the academy, I spot
Smart Falcon running my way with a huge grin on her face.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be cheerleading at the next Tracen Meet! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Held twice a year at Tracen Academy, the Tracen Meet is a race that
never fails to attract a crowd. It's one of the institution's largest
events.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep! The one and only! There's gonna be sooo many people coming
to watch!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I can make all those people my fans if I dance for them!
Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that evening, I run into her a second time, but her energy is
drastically different.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Go, go. You can do it.
Let's go. Do it, do it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to call out to her when I notice her talk to another
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really wanted to dance, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Why'd they put us on flag duty anyway?

text_block_list.name: Dirt-Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
"You should do dirt racing!" this. "You're really good at twirling a
flag!" that. It's like we never get a say in what we do. Nobody's ever
gonna notice us at this rate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears the two have been assigned to flag duty instead of the
main cheerleading roles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I try to come up with something positive to say...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it is what it is, so we might as well make the most of it and do
our best! C'mon, let's get back to practice!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So we hold it like this... and spin it like that! Then we do this, and...
voila! Easy as pie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their flags flutter in the evening sky. As I watch the two flag-bearers
handle the heavy poles with ease, I begin to understand why they
were assigned that role.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their practice now complete, Smart Falcon's partner takes her
leave, leaving me free to approach the now-alone Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... That took way more energy than I thought it would... I'm totally exhausted!
choice_data_list: You twirled that flag like a champ.
You twirled that flag like a champ.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Trainer! When did you get here?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really did want to show off my cute dance moves instead of... this.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I guess that's true... Maybe I'll still be able to wow people like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon remains a bit doubtful, but the day of the Tracen Meet
arrives regardless.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Go! Go! You can do it!
Let's go! Do it! Do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon twirls her flag next to the breathtaking dancers, waiting
for her time in the spotlight. When it's finally her turn, she moves to
the center and seizes the opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Go! Go! YOU CAN DO IT!
Let's go! Do it! DO IT!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look at her with the flag! She's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The way she handles that thing... I've never seen someone so in
sync with their flag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Or so I thought.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Man, these cheerleaders are crazy good! Are you seeing this?! Tell me
who else could pull off a pyramid like that!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're right! And look at their beautiful smiles! They're so cool
and cute that I can't take my eyes off them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... "The flag-bearers were great, but the cheerleaders were the stars of the show!" is all I keep hearing...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I knew I couldn't compete with them...
choice_data_list: You did your best, and that's what matters!
You did your best, and that's what matters!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But they probably won't remember who I am! Maybe they'll be able to
recall the flag's pattern, but not who waved it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some results take time and effort to attain, and becoming a top
Umadol might be one of them.
